---
title: "14 Regulatory Network Analysis"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Global rendering configuration for the whole project
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.dpi = 300,
  fig.align = "center"
)
```

# Package Loading
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(igraph)
```

# Global Parameters
# Regulatory confidence screening criteria

# Data Import
# Import regulatory data from TRRUST, miRTarBase, StarBase
# Import core hub gene list

# Data Analysis
# 1. TF-gene regulatory data sorting and deduplication
# 2. miRNA-gene regulatory data sorting and deduplication
# 3. Construction of integrated upstream and downstream regulatory network
# 4. Screening of core regulatory miRNA and transcription factors

# Visualization
# Regulatory network visualization

# Result Export
# Output regulatory network node and edge information table

# Result Description
# Explain database screening standards and upstream regulatory mechanism
